mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT at.name FROM activity_tag_rel rel JOIN activity_tag at ON rel.tag_id = at.id WHERE rel.activity_id = #{activityId}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.cover_image, a.location_name, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.max_participants, a.current_participants, a.status, a.category_id, ac.name AS category_name, a.creator_id, u.nickname AS creator_nickname, u.avatar AS creator_avatar, a.created_at FROM activity a JOIN activity_category ac ON a.category_id = ac.id JOIN `user` u ON a.creator_id = u.id WHERE a.creator_id = #{creatorId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
